hero.subtitle: Deep muscle relief, optimized sleep and high-performance recovery — one premium ritual for home.

problem.title: Modern life destroys your recovery.
problem.body: Screens, stress, poor posture and intense training keep your body in a permanent deficit. RECOVERY SYSTEM™ is built to close that gap every single day.
items: Neck tension from office and screens
Mental fatigue and low daytime energy
No real decompression ritual for stress

items.q: How long until I notice results?
items.a: Most customers feel a difference within the first week of consistent use. Muscle tension typically reduces within 2–3 days of daily use.

items.q: Is the Pulse Pro X suitable for daily use?
items.a: Yes. The Pulse Pro X is designed for daily recovery rituals. Start with 2–3 minute sessions per muscle group and adjust to your needs.
We offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If you are not completely satisfied, contact us for a full refund — no questions asked.
Yes, we ship worldwide. Standard shipping is free on all orders. Express options are available at checkout.

items.q: Can I use CerviFlex if I have chronic neck pain?
items.a: CerviFlex is designed for everyday tension relief, not medical treatment. Please consult your doctor if you have a chronic condition.

footer.tagline: Premium recovery tools for modern performance.
